generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor providing real-time occupancy status data for building spaces, integrated into the physical infrastructure and transmitting data via Eclipse Hono for real-time ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring environmental metrics such as temperature, humidity, and air quality, transmitting data via Eclipse Hono for real-time processing and synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor monitoring real-time energy consumption across building systems, transmitting data via Eclipse Hono for integration into the digital twin's energy optimization workflows."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized IoT sensor capturing post-occupancy data (e.g., occupancy patterns, environmental conditions) used in BOREALIS project to iteratively refine control policies for adaptive building operations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data transmitted from OccupancySensor via Eclipse Hono, normalized and processed for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental metrics (temperature, humidity, air quality) transmitted from EnvironmentalConditionSensor via Eclipse Hono, enriched with metadata for digital twin integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance EnergyUsageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data transmitted from EnergyUsageSensor via Eclipse Hono, used for predictive maintenance and energy optimization in the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data (occupancy patterns, environmental conditions) transmitted via Eclipse Hono, used in BOREALIS project to refine reinforcement learning-based control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model (BIM) serving as the semantic backbone of the digital twin, enriched with runtime metadata (sensor/actuator configurations, control logic) for model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelEnrichmentEnabler, ModelValidationEnabler, ArtifactGenerationEnabler
]

instance RuntimeMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured metadata extracted from BIM models, including tenant IDs, device endpoints, and sensor configurations, enabling automated device discovery and data mapping."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelEnrichmentEnabler, ArtifactGenerationEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized real-time operational data ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto, combining sensor data (occupancy, environmental, energy) for digital twin synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based control models (e.g., BOREALIS) for adaptive decision-making, balancing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArtifactGenerationEnabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5, providing immersive interfaces for monitoring building performance (energy usage, occupancy patterns)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ThingModelRepresentation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware artifacts (Eclipse Ditto Thing Models) abstracting device configurations and enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono providing IoT connectivity, device management, and real-time data ingestion from physical sensors via standardized middleware interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedControlConfigurationService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto managing digital twin communication, bidirectional synchronization, and Thing Model-based device abstraction for interoperability."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedControlConfigurationService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 providing rich, interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring of building operations and performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ModelEnrichmentEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool extending BIM models with runtime metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) for automated device discovery."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArtifactGenerationService
]

instance ModelValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated validation tool ensuring semantic consistency and completeness of enriched BIM models before deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables ArtifactGenerationService
]

instance ArtifactGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-text transformation tool generating runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto and control logic for Building Control Systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentAutomationService
]

instance DeploymentAutomationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated deployment framework enabling minimal-manual-intervention deployment of digital twin artifacts via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration management system supporting runtime updates (new sensors, policy refinements) without full redeployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedControlConfigurationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard service in Unreal Engine 5 for monitoring operational states (energy usage, occupancy patterns) with immersive 3D visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDashboardInsight, AnomalyAlertAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional synchronization between virtual models and physical actuators (lighting, HVAC) via automated control logic."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "What-if simulation service evaluating impact of control strategies or design changes before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioTestingInsight
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating deployable digital twin artifacts (runtime configurations, control logic) from enriched BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentArtifactInsight
]

instance DeploymentAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service auto-deploying digital twin components with minimal manual intervention using standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentStatusInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building performance metrics (energy usage, occupancy) in real-time via Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance AnomalyAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts triggered for performance deviations or anomalies detected through real-time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights optimizing energy consumption based on reinforcement learning models (BOREALIS)."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights balancing visual comfort with energy efficiency using adaptive control policies."
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of non-visual health effects (e.g., air quality, lighting) and their optimization."
]

instance ScenarioTestingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation results of what-if simulations for control strategies or design changes before physical deployment."
]

instance ControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control signals sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) for dynamic adjustments to operational parameters (lighting, HVAC)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated deployable artifacts (runtime configurations, control logic) ready for digital twin deployment."
]

instance DeploymentStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and progress of automated digital twin deployment across centralized or modular architectures."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator for dynamic lighting control, receiving automated control signals from the digital twin for adaptive adjustments."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator for HVAC system adjustments, synchronized with digital twin control models for energy optimization."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized Building Control System integrating sensors, actuators, and controllers for bidirectional communication with the digital twin."
    base:contains LightingActuator, HvacActuator
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all digital twin components and their interactions."
    base:contains BuildingControlSystem, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalConditionSensor, EnergyUsageSensor, PostOccupancySensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **bidirectional control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework supports **automated commissioning** of devices (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) by leveraging **model-to-text transformations** to generate runtime configurations for actuators. **Eclipse Ditto** facilitates the **publishing of control commands** (e.g., dimming levels, temperature setpoints) to physical devices, while **Eclipse Hono** ensures secure and reliable message routing. The **TwinLight** project demonstrates this with **BIM-centric control configuration**, and **BOREALIS** extends it to **reinforcement learning-based adaptive control**, enabling dynamic adjustments to physical systems based on real-time feedback."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring continuous alignment. The framework supports **iterative policy refinement** (e.g., in BOREALIS) where control strategies are dynamically adjusted based on runtime data. While the exact latency is not specified, the system is designed for **low-latency interactions** to enable responsive operational adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing spatial, geometric, and functional data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **real-time data exchange** and **device abstraction**.
  3. **Control Layer**: **Building Control Systems (BCS)** and **reinforcement learning models** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) for adaptive decision-making.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** for **immersive monitoring and simulation**.
  5. **Extension Layer**: **Modular services** (e.g., predictive maintenance, energy optimization) integrated via **standardized APIs**.
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** by allowing **independent scaling** of sub-systems (e.g., per-floor twins) while maintaining **global synchronization** through shared middleware."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **all life cycle stages** of the building, from **design and construction** (as-designed representation) to **operation and refurbishment** (as-operated representation). During the **design phase**, the DT leverages BIM for **clash detection, performance simulation, and documentation**. In the **construction phase**, it supports **progress tracking and quality assurance**. During **operation**, the DT enables **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., via **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning). For **refurbishment**, the DT facilitates **what-if analysis** and **retrofit planning** by integrating as-built data with operational feedback. The framework ensures **long-term compatibility** with AECO standards (e.g., BIM, IFC) to support **legacy system integration** and **future-proofing**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the **degree of synchronization** between the DT and PT, addressing **semantic drift** (as discussed in [49]).
  2. **Automated validation** of BIM models (per [65]) to detect **inconsistencies** or **missing metadata** before deployment.
  3. **Real-time data normalization** via Eclipse Ditto to mitigate **sensor errors** or **data anomalies**.
  4. **Bidirectional synchronization** protocols to minimize **latency** and **data loss** during control signal transmission.
  5. **Uncertainty modeling** in **BOREALIS**’ reinforcement learning, where **post-occupancy data** iteratively refines control policies to reduce **prediction errors**.
  The framework also supports **verification and validation (V&V)** through **simulation testing** (e.g., Unreal Engine 5) and **real-world case studies** (e.g., Living Lab deployments)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) is established using **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for real-time data exchange. These middleware components facilitate **bidirectional communication** between sensors/actuators in the physical system and the DT’s virtual representation. The framework does not specify exact protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) but relies on Hono/Ditto’s standardized interfaces for seamless integration."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points**, enabling interoperability with external systems. While specific external systems (e.g., ERP, CMMS) are not mentioned, the modular architecture allows for seamless integration of additional services or data sources, ensuring **scalable and extensible DT ecosystems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic representation. It leverages **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles to ensure consistency and reusability across the DT life cycle. While specific standards (e.g., IFC, OASIS MQTT) are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed to align with **AECO-specific standards** and **domain-specific workflows** (e.g., TwinLight, BOREALIS)."
]
